design_philosophy.inspiration: CRED App - Premium, Dark, Motion-Heavy, Gamified
core_principles: High contrast accent colors (Neon Purple, Electric Cyan, Gold)

page_transition.description: Wallpaper image scales from grid to fullscreen with hero animation

card_hover.description: Card tilts based on touch position, neon glow follows finger

download_button.description: Button morphs from 'Download' text → circular progress → checkmark → confetti burst
stages: Tap: Button shrinks to circle, shows progress ring
100%: Checkmark draws with SVG stroke animation
Complete: Confetti particles burst from center

scroll_reveal.description: Cards fade in and translate Y 30px with 50ms stagger

parallax_header.description: Header image moves at 0.5x scroll speed, title moves at 1.2x

pull_to_refresh.description: Wallpaper grid stretches elastically, releases with spring bounce

tab_switch.description: Active tab indicator morphs shape and slides between tabs like liquid

notification_toast.description: Toast slides from top with neon border glow pulse

premium_unlock.description: Locked wallpaper reveals with curtain split + golden particles
stages: Golden light rays emanate from wallpaper
'Premium Unlocked' text types in with cursor

creator_verification.description: Blue checkmark badge pops with scale bounce, sparkles orbit around it

states.trending: Fire emoji badge, pulsing red glow

overlay_info.content: Wallpaper name, creator avatar + name, download count, price (if paid)

bottom_sheet.enter_animation: Slide from bottom with spring, backdrop blurs
bottom_sheet.drag_to_dismiss: Velocity-based dismiss with rubber band resistance
bottom_sheet.handle: Pill-shaped drag indicator, pulsing on touch

search_bar.expanded: Full width, glowing border, search suggestions dropdown with stagger
search_bar.clear_button: X morphs from search icon with rotation

sequence: 0.3s: App logo (stylized 'W') draws with SVG stroke animation, neon purple glow
0.8s: Logo fills with gradient, subtle pulse
1.2s: Tagline 'Your Walls, Your Story' types in with cursor blink
1.8s: Particles burst from logo, screen fades to onboarding or home

onboarding_flow.style: Full-screen immersive slides with parallax backgrounds

slides.title: Discover Stunning Walls
slides.animation: Wallpapers float in 3D space, user can tilt phone to parallax

slides.title: Support Creators
slides.animation: Coins rain animation, creator avatars pop in with stagger

slides.title: Go Premium
slides.animation: Golden lock unlocks with key turn animation, confetti

onboarding_flow.page_indicator: Animated dots that morph into line segments

header.content: Greeting + date, streak counter (gamification), search icon
header.animation: Shrinks and blurs on scroll, tab bar pins to top

wallpaper_grid.scroll_animation: Cards fade up with 50ms stagger, scale 0.95 → 1.0

featured_section.animation: Snap scroll with 3D perspective tilt on edges

floating_actions.upload_button: Bottom-right FAB, pulsing glow for new creators
floating_actions.premium_banner: Bottom sticky, slides up after 3 seconds on home

wallpaper_detail_screen.enter_animation: Shared element - image from grid scales to fullscreen

layout.bottom_sheet: Draggable info panel with: name, creator info, tags, resolution, price

actions.apply: Direct apply with system preview overlay
actions.share: Native share sheet with custom preview card
actions.favorite: Heart fills with particle burst, haptic tap
actions.tip_creator: Floating coin button, tap opens tip modal

wallpaper_detail_screen.related_wallpapers: Horizontal scroll at bottom, 'More from [Creator]' + 'Similar Style'

steps.title: Select Wallpaper
steps.ui: Image picker with drag-drop zone, preview with auto-crop guides
steps.animation: Image drops in with bounce, grid lines animate in

steps.title: Add Details
steps.animation: Fields slide in from right with stagger

steps.title: Set Pricing

paid_flow.price_input: Animated number counter, currency symbol glows
paid_flow.payout_method: UPI ID input with validation animation, or Razorpay Connect onboarding
paid_flow.preview: Shows creator earnings after platform fee (70/20/10 split)

steps.animation: Toggle between free/paid morphs the card shape

steps.title: Review & Submit
steps.preview: Final card mockup with all details
steps.submit_button: 'Publish' with rocket launch animation on success

sections.title: Earnings Overview
sections.content: Total earnings card with animated number counter, daily/weekly/monthly toggle
sections.chart: Line chart with gradient fill, animated draw-on-enter

sections.title: Top Wallpapers
sections.content: Ranked list with download bars that animate fill

sections.title: Payout Status
sections.content: Progress bar to next payout threshold, recent payouts list

sections.title: Creator Level
sections.content: XP bar with level badge, next level rewards preview
sections.animation: XP bar fills with particle trail on progress

profile_screen.header: Large avatar with 3D tilt on touch, username with verified badge
profile_screen.stats: Downloads, Favorites, Following creators - animated counters

settings.theme_toggle: Dark/Light switch with sun/moon morph animation
settings.logout: Red button with shake animation on confirmation

login_signup_screen.style: Minimal, full-bleed background wallpaper that changes subtly

login.animation: Fields float up on focus with glow border
login.submit: Button with loading shimmer, success morphs to checkmark
login.biometric: Face ID / Fingerprint icon with pulse animation

signup.otp: 6 boxes with auto-focus, numbers bounce in
signup.avatar: Grid of options with selection ring animation

social_login.animation: Buttons slide in from bottom with stagger

creator_web_portal.design: Same dark theme, optimized for desktop + tablet

upload_interface.drag_drop: Large drop zone with animated border, files bounce in on drop
upload_interface.batch_upload: Multiple files with individual progress bars
upload_interface.ai_tag_suggestion: Auto-generated tags appear with typing animation

analytics.charts: Recharts/D3 with hover tooltips, animated transitions
analytics.heatmap: Download activity by day/hour with color intensity

payout_management.balance_card: Large animated number, withdrawal button with golden glow

admin_web_dashboard.design: Professional dark theme with data-density focus

layout.top_bar: Search, notifications bell with badge pulse, admin profile

wallpaper_management.bulk_actions: Select multiple, approve/reject with confirmation modal

creator_management.pending_approvals: Card list with approve/reject buttons, document preview
creator_management.creator_profiles: Detailed view with all uploads, earnings, payout history

payout_requests.action: Process payout button → RazorpayX API integration
payout_requests.bulk_payout: Select multiple, process batch with progress

user_management.ban/suspend: Action with reason modal, confirmation shake

content_moderation.review_workflow: Side-by-side original vs flagged, action buttons

gestures.swipe_wallpaper: Horizontal swipe to next/prev with 3D card flip
gestures.pinch_zoom: On detail screen, pinch to zoom with elastic bounds
gestures.long_press: On grid, long press enters multi-select mode with haptic
gestures.pull_refresh: Elastic pull with spinning logo, release bounce
gestures.double_tap: Double tap wallpaper to like with heart burst animation

haptic_feedback.error_pattern: Two quick medium taps for errors

user_side.download_streak: Daily download streak with flame animation, rewards at milestones
user_side.referral_program: Invite friends, both get premium trial

creator_levels.level_1: Seedling - New creator, basic upload limit
creator_levels.level_5: Legend - 500 uploads, custom profile, early access

creator_side.leaderboard: Weekly top creators with podium animation

mobile_frameworks.ios: SwiftUI with matchedGeometryEffect for shared transitions
mobile_frameworks.cross_platform_consideration: React Native with Reanimated 3 (if choosing cross-platform)

performance.image_loading: Progressive loading with blur placeholder, lazy loading
performance.animation_optimization: Use hardware acceleration, avoid layout thrashing
performance.reduced_motion: Respect system accessibility settings, fallback to simple fades
